name: herald-vault
description: HERALD session-vault service (SPEC-C). Orchestrates consented browser-session capture, per-user KMS-encrypted storage in Secrets Manager (herald/sessions/<person>/<platform>), the consent ledger, and destructive revoke. The Lambda handles consent + revoke + status and NEVER reads cookie plaintext (only fargate roles touch session material); the capture harness (scripts/capture-session.mjs) runs in the ephemeral capture task and calls storeSession after a real human login. Runtime injection is Piper's vault.mjs half. One agent = one service (SEC-3).
